effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks, COST  [Soul Blast (1) & discard a card from hand], choose a Meteorite card from your drop, put it into your hand, and this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: So our ideals cannot be understood by lesser beings...

effectEN: [AUTO](RC)1/Turn :When your Meteorite is put into your order other than from drop, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose a Meteorite from your drop, put it into your Order Zone, and this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), COST  [Counter Blast (1) & put a grade 2 or greater Set Order from your drop on the bottom of your deck], and draw a card.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When your "Mobile Fortress of Obliteration, Freischutz Maximum" is operated, if you did not Counter Charge this turn, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], and Counter Charge (1).
flavorTextEN: The consequences of the CEO's recklessness usually fall upon the accounting department.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is put on (GC), if your Order Zone has a Product card, this unit gets [Shield]+5000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: None shall trespass as I am here.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose one of your opponent's front row rear-guards in the same column as this unit, and retire it.
[CONT](RC):During your turn, if your Order Zone has a Base, this unit gets [Power]+5000.
flavorTextEN: Destructive power! As long as you have that, most things will go well!

effectEN:
(After a Set Order is played, put it into your Order Zone.)
[AUTO]:When this card is put into your Order Zone, look at the top seven cards of your deck, choose up to three cards with "Hero" in its card name from among them and reveal them, put up to one card from among them into your hand, and Scout up to two cards from among them into your Base, and shuffle your deck.
[ACT](Order Zone):COST  [[Rest] this card, and discard a card from hand], choose one of your Scouted cards with grade less than or equal to your vanguard, and call it to (RC).
[AUTO](Order Zone):When your unit is attacked, COST  [Soul Blast (1) & [Rest] this card], choose one of your Scouted cards, and call it to (GC).
flavorTextEN: To manage the power of heroes overflowing with originality. In preparation of the danger that approaches.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks, if your order zone has three or more Set Orders with different card names, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], and this unit gets [Power]+10000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
[AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks a vanguard, COST  [Soul Blast (3)], and your opponent cannot call cards by the ability of your Prison until end of their next turn.
[AUTO]:When this unit is retired from (RC) or (GC), your opponent chooses two of their cards imprisoned in your Prison, and calls each card to (RC) or puts them into their hand. (They can call both cards. This effect is mandatory)
flavorTextEN: Ehh~, isn't it all right♡? Let us take it a bit slower~♡

effectEN:
[ACT](VC)1/Turn :COST  [Scout a card with "Hero" in its card name from your hand into your Base], and draw a card. (Scouted cards are put face up into your Order Zone)
[AUTO](RC)1/Turn :When this unit is moved to another (RC) during your battle phase, this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: He approaches in an instant. Not just physically, but emotionally too.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed by riding from "Searching for Monster Souls, Arkhite ", search your deck for up to one Research card, reveal it and put it into your hand, and shuffle your deck.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose one of your opponent's front row rear-guards in the same column as this unit, and retire it.

flavorTextEN: Destructive power! As long as you have that, most things will go well!

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this card is Scouted, Soul Charge (1). (Activates when it is Scouted and put into the Order Zone)
[CONT](GC):If your Order Zone has a Base, and you have a vanguard with "B-Hero" in its card name, this unit gets [Shield]+10000.
flavorTextEN: Rest assured! I shall protect the lives of you all!

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), choose a unit card with "Monster" in its card name from your drop, and you may put it into your order zone.
[CONT](GC):If your order zone has two or more Research cards, this unit gets [Shield]+5000.
flavorTextEN: A gale is better than a thousand blades.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), if your order zone has two or more Set Orders, you may Soul Charge (1).
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), COST  [discard a card from your hand], look at cards from the top of your deck equal to the number of Research cards with different card names in your Order Zone, choose a card from among them, put it into your hand, and shuffle your deck.
flavorTextEN: The days you spend training will become your support during combat.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks, this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of that battle for every two Research cards in your order zone.
flavorTextEN: The new weapon that came from repeated research will pierce the light at the end of the galaxy――!

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this card is discarded from hand for the cost of the ability of a Base in your order zone, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], call this card to (RC), choose a card with "B-Hero" in its card name from your drop, and Scout it to your Base. (Scouted cards are put face up into your order zone)
[CONT](RC):During your turn, if you have two or more Bases in your order zone, this unit gets [Power]+10000.
flavorTextEN: The hero stands up. Courageous and strong with a mission in mind.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), COST  [Counter Blast (1) & put a grade 2 or greater Set Order from your drop on the bottom of the deck], and draw a card.
flavorTextEN: She is the only one that can handle the reckless schedule changes from the CEO.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this card is put into your soul from deck, if you have a vanguard with "Nordlinger" in its card name, you may call this card to the back row (RC).
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
(After a set order is played, put it into your order zone.)
[AUTO]:When this card is put into the order zone, if you have a vanguard with "Blitz" in its card name, draw a card, and Soul Charge (1).
Operate-[AUTO](Order Zone):When this card is operated, if it is your main phase, look at the top five cards of your deck, choose up to one unit card from among them with grade less than or equal to your vanguard, call it to (RC), shuffle your deck. If it is your battle phase, draw a card.
flavorTextEN: Take flight. Beyond the distant sky, to the end of the space.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), if your order zone has a set order, COST  [Counter Blast (1) & discard a card from hand], search your deck for up to one card with the same card name as your vanguard or up to one Product card, reveal it and put it into your hand, and shuffle your deck. If you have a vanguard with "Welstra" in its card name, choose up to one Product card from your hand, and put it into the order zone.
[AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks a vanguard, if you have a vanguard with "Welstra" in its card name, COST  [Soul Blast (2)], choose a Product from your order zone, and operate it.
flavorTextEN: Freelance operators sure have a lot of work to do.

nameEN: One Who Peruses the Proto Galaxy
effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), if your order zone has two or more Set Orders, you may Soul Charge (1).
flavorTextEN: Investigate. There is truth buried below the sediments.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is rode upon by a grade 3 card with "Avantgarda" in its card name, if your soul has "Blue Deathster, Sora Piriod", search your deck for up to one grade 2 Strategy card, reveal it and put it into your hand, and shuffle your deck. If you did not reveal a card, you may call this card to (RC).
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

Choose a set order from your drop, and put it into your hand. Choose a set order from your drop with a different card name from the card put into hand with this effect, and put it into your hand. ("If you persona rode" is active even if persona ride activated outside normal riding)

effectEN:

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), COST  [Soul Blast (2)], choose a grade 2 Strategy card from your drop, and put it into your hand.

flavorTextEN: I want to tell you that I love you sooner.

[AUTO](Soul):When a grade 4 with "Messiah" in its card name is placed on (VC), you may call this card to (RC). If you called a card, Soul Charge (1).
[AUTO]:When this unit is unlocked during your turn, choose one of your units in the same column as this unit, and it gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC) Generation Break 1 (Active if you have one or more face up G units in total on your (VC) or G zone):When this unit attacks, if you have a vanguard with "Messiah" in its card name, this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of that battle, and at the end of that battle, lock this unit. (Locked cards cannot do anything. They are unlocked and turned face up as [Stand] at the end of their owner's turn)
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [CONT](RC):During your turn, if you have a vanguard with "Avantgarda" in its card name, this unit gets [Power]+5000, and if your Strategy card was put from order zone into the soul this turn, this unit gets [Power]+5000.
flavorTextEN: Rend it. The requiem of bullets.

effectEN:
[AUTO](RC):When your vanguard with "Avantgarda" in its card name attacks, this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), if your Strategy card was put from order zone into the soul this turn, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], search your deck or drop for up to one Strategy card with a different card name from any card put from order zone into the soul this turn, reveal it and put it into your hand, and if you searched your deck, shuffle your deck.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC)1/Turn :When your Meteorite is put into your order other than from drop, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose a Meteorite from your drop, put it into your Order Zone, and this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Oh star laying on the ground. Fly through the sky once more.

effectEN:
[CONT](RC):During your turn, if any player has a locked card, this unit gets [Power]+5000.
[AUTO](RC):At the end of the battle this unit attacked, if you have an "Alter Ego Messiah" crest, COST  [retire this unit], look at the top three cards of your deck, choose up to one unit card with grade equal to or less than your vanguard from among them, put it on an open (RC) as a locked card, and put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), choose a unit card with "Monster" in its card name from your drop, and you may put it into your order zone.
[CONT](GC):If your order zone has two or more Research cards, this unit gets [Shield]+5000.
flavorTextEN: A gale is better than a thousand blades.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks, this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of that battle for every two Research cards in your order zone.
flavorTextEN: The new weapon that came from repeated research will pierce the light at the end of the galaxy――!

nameEN: Sickle Blade of Investigation, Habitable Zone
effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this card is discarded from hand during your ride phase, COST  [Soul Blast (1) & put this card on the bottom of deck], and draw a card.
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), if you persona rode this turn, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], search your deck for up to one set order card, reveal it and put it into your hand, and shuffle your deck. Until end of turn, you can play a total of up to two orders, and the next set order you play can be played without paying its cost.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC) from hand, if your World is Dark Night or Abyssal Dark Night, you may look at the top seven cards of your deck. If you do, choose up to two World cards from among them, discard them, and shuffle your deck.
[AUTO](RC):At the end of the battle that this unit attacked a vanguard, if your World is Abyssal Dark Night, COST  [retire this unit], choose a World card from your drop, and put it into your hand.
flavorTextEN: The light is torn apart, and the true night is materialized.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC)1/Turn :When a set order you played from hand is put into the order zone, this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn. You may look at the top five cards of your deck. If you do, choose up to one set order from among them, reveal it and put it into your hand, and shuffle your deck.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), COST  [Soul Blast (2)], choose a grade 2 Strategy card from your drop, and put it into your hand.
flavorTextEN: Understood. No sweat. Leave it to me.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), if you have three or more Dragontree markers on (RC), COST  [Counter Blast (1) & Soul Blast (1)], and draw a card.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When your opponent's rear-guard is placed by your Prison's ability, you may return this unit to your hand.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this card is discarded from hand for the cost of the ability of a Base in your order zone, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], call this card to (RC), choose a card with "B-Hero" in its card name from your drop, and Scout it to your Base. (Scouted cards are put face up into your order zone)
[CONT](RC):During your turn, if you have two or more Bases, this unit gets [Power]+10000.
flavorTextEN: Arise, B-hero. With the mission in your heart, be gallant and strong.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), COST  [Counter Blast (1)], look at the top five cards of your deck, choose up to one card with "Monster" in its card name from among them, reveal it and put it into your hand, shuffle your deck, and this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is rode upon by "Gigant Arms, Silhouette", choose up to two cards with "Armed Arms " in their different card names from your drop, and call them to open (RC).
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO](VC/RC):When this unit attacks a vanguard, if you have a grade 3 or greater vanguard with "Silhouette " in its card name, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose one of your opponent's grade 2 or greater rear-guards, retire it, and this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO](VC/RC):When this unit attacks a grade 3 or greater vanguard, if you have a vanguard with "Silhouette " in its card name, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], and draw a card.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit's attack hits a vanguard, choose up to two of your opponent's rear-guards, and imprison them in your Prison. (Put them into your Order Zone that has a Prison)
flavorTextEN: "Cosmo Security" will resolve any interstellar troubles.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks a vanguard, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose one of your opponent's rear-guards, imprison it in your Prison, and this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
[CONT](VC):During your turn, if one or more of your opponent's cards are imprisoned in your Prison, this unit gets [Power]+10000, and if three or more cards are imprisoned, this unit gets drive +1.
[ACT](VC/RC)1/Turn :COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose two of your opponent's rear-guards, and imprison them in your Prison. (Put them into your Order Zone that has a Prison)
flavorTextEN: All your friends have been surrounded. What will you do?

effectEN:
[CONT](VC/RC):During your turn, if your World is Dark Night or Abyssal Dark Night, this unit gets [Power]+5000.
[ACT](VC):If your World is Abyssal Dark Night, COST  [Counter Blast (2)], and call up to three Shadow Army tokens to (RC). (Your World changes when you play a specific order. Shadow Army has [Power]15000 and Boost)
flavorTextEN: They leave their blades unsheathed. In anticipation of the next duel to the death.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks, COST  [Soul Blast (1) & retire a Shadow Army Token], and until end of that battle, when your opponent would call cards from their hand to (GC), they must call two or more at the same time.
flavorTextEN: One of the few opportunities. I have to get rid of it no matter what.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit's attack boosted by a Shadow Army token hits, draw a card.
flavorTextEN: Over in this world, the likes of you are not needed.

effectEN: [ACT](RC)1/Turn :COST  [Soul Blast (1)], and this unit gets [Power]+2000 until end of turn. Choose one of your opponent's front row rear-guards, and imprison it in your Prison. (Put them into your Order Zone that has a Prison)
flavorTextEN: From the legend of the Blue Warrior, the Crimson Gladiator was born.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (VC), search your deck for up to two Meteorite cards, put them into your Order Zone, and shuffle your deck.
[AUTO](VC):When this unit attacks, COST  [Counter-Blast 1 & put one or more Meteorites from your Order Zone into your drop], until end of that battle, this unit gets [Power]+15000, if you put three or more Meteorite cards into your drop for this cost, it gets [Critical]+1, and if you put five or more, your trigger effects activate twice.
flavorTextEN: Pay close attention, to the manifestation of our utopia.

effectEN: [CONT](RC):If you persona rode this turn, this unit gets [Power]+5000.

(After a Set Order is played, put it into your Order Zone.)
Play this with COST  [Soul Blast (1)]!
[AUTO]:When this card is put in the order zone, choose one of your opponent's front row rear-guards, and retire it.
[CONT](Order Zone):If your order zone only has World cards, the following effects are active according to the number of cards in your order zone.
•1 card ‐ Your World becomes Dark Night.
•2 or more cards ‐ Your World becomes Abyssal Dark Night.
flavorTextEN: In the darkness where even the moon cannot be seen, catastrophe approached from beyond the world.

effectEN: [CONT](RC):If your World is Abyssal Dark Night, when this unit would attack, it battles all of the units in one of your opponent's columns.
flavorTextEN: Casualties from monster attacks are still common, and ensuring safety proves to be difficult.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks, if the number of your rear-guards is more than your opponent's, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], Soul Charge (1), and this unit gets [Power]+10000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: We have the advantage! Break through in one go!

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks, COST  [Counter Blast (1) & Soul Blast (3)], choose up to three of your opponent's rear-guards, and imprison them in your Prison. If three or more of your opponent's cards are imprisoned in your Prison, until end of that battle, this unit gets [Power]+10000, and if five or more are imprisoned, this unit gets [Critical]+1.
flavorTextEN: Apprehend them all!! Follow after me!

effectEN:
(After a Set Order is played, put it into your Order Zone.)
Play this with COST  [Soul Blast (2)]!
[CONT](Order Zone):If your order zone only has World cards, the following effects are active according to the number of cards in your order zone.
•1 card ‐ Your World becomes Dark Night.
•2 or more cards ‐ Your World becomes Abyssal Dark Night.
[AUTO](Order Zone):When your Shadow Army token is placed, that placed unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Here is where the uncontrollable determination and oath are engraved.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit is boosted by a Shadow Army token, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], and Counter Charge (1).
flavorTextEN: Collecting the dispersed energy, and taking aim for the next shot.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks, COST  [Soul Blast (1) & retire a Shadow Army Token], and until end of that battle, when your opponent would call cards from their hand to (GC), they must call two or more at the same time.
flavorTextEN: The remaining few good machines. We must stop it no matter what.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit's attack hits, search your deck for up to one Meteorite card, put it into your Order Zone, and shuffle your deck.
flavorTextEN: What is to be feared, is her power to distort gravity and control the planet.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), COST  [Soul Blast (1)], choose a Meteorite card from your drop, and put it into your Order Zone.
[CONT](RC):During your turn, if your opponent's rear-guard is retired this turn, this unit gets [Power]+5000, and if three or more were retired, [Critical]+1.
flavorTextEN: A planned calamity. That which follows is the new ruler.

effectEN: [AUTO](Front Row RC)1/Turn :When your opponent's rear-guard is placed other than from their hand, [Rest] that unit.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [ACT](RC):COST  [Retire a Shadow Army token], and this unit gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn. If this ability was activated for the third time this turn, this unit gets [Critical]+1 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit's attack hits, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], your opponent chooses a card from their hand, and imprisons it in your Prison.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
(After a Set Order is played, put it into your Order Zone.)
Play this with COST  [Soul Blast (2)]!
[CONT](Order Zone):If your order zone only has World cards, the following effects are active according to the number of cards in your order zone.
•1 card ‐ Your World becomes Dark Night.
•2 or more cards ‐ Your World becomes Abyssal Dark Night.
[AUTO](Order Zone):When your Shadow Army token is placed, that placed unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Right here, an unshakeable will and oath is engraved.

[AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks, your opponent's unit being attacked gets [Power]-2000 until end of that battle.
[AUTO](RC):When this unit is attacked, your opponent's unit that attacked gets [Power]-2000 until end of that battle.

nameEN: Melt in the Darkness, its Evil Heart

Play this with COST  [Counter Blast (1)]!
Choose one of your units, and it gets [Power]+10000 until end of that battle for each of your Shadow Army tokens.

effectEN: [CONT](VC/RC):If your Order Zone has no cards, this unit cannot attack.
[AUTO](RC):When this unit is boosted by a Shadow Army token, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], and Counter Charge (1).
flavorTextEN: Collecting the dispersed energy, and taking aim for the next shot.

effectEN: [ACT](RC):COST  [Retire a Shadow Army token], and this unit gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn. If this ability was activated for the third time this turn, this unit gets [Critical]+1 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: As many times as it takes, until the enemy breathes its last.

effectEN: [AUTO](Front Row RC)1/Turn :When your opponent's rear-guard is placed other than from their hand, [Rest] that unit.
flavorTextEN: The observing eye towards illegal immigrants shines stylishly.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit's attack hits, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], your opponent chooses a card from their hand, and imprisons it in your Prison.
flavorTextEN: Those who don't follow the rules will be brought to scary places!

nameEN: Dissolve into the Depths of Hades, Oh Evil Heart
effectEN:
Play this with COST  [Counter Blast (1)]!
Choose one of your units, and it gets [Power]+10000 until end of that battle for each of your Shadow Army tokens.
flavorTextEN: A multitude of shadows will vanquish all evils.

effectEN: [CONT](VC/RC):If your Order Zone has no cards, this unit cannot attack.
flavorTextEN: An extra large monster that only targets power generation facilities.

effectEN:
[AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks, your opponent's unit being attacked gets [Power]-2000 until end of that battle.
[AUTO](RC):When this unit is attacked, your opponent's unit that attacked gets [Power]-2000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: Dulling the movements with adhesive bubbles, before revealing the sure-kill scissors technique.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), COST  [Counter Blast (1) & Soul Blast (1)], choose one of your opponent’s rear-guards with the same grade as the card Soul Blast for this cost, and retire it.
[Glitter]-"Kheios" (Active if your vanguard is a [Glitter] with "Kheios" in its card name)
[AUTO](RC)1/Turn :When your vanguard attacks, if your soul has eight or more cards with different card names, [Stand] this unit. If you [Stand] this unit, put this unit into your soul at the end of turn.
flavorTextEN: As you wish.

effectEN:
[ACT](VC)1/Turn :COST  [Counter Blast (1)], look at cards from the top of your deck equal to the number of Research cards in your Order Zone, choose up to one card from among them, put it into your hand put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order, and this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
[AUTO](VC):When this unit attacks, COST  [Counter Blast (1) & Soul Blast (1)], search your deck or hand for up to one card with "Obscudeid" in its card name, and call it to (RC). If you searched your deck, shuffle your deck.
[Glitter](This card is a [Glitter] which seeks the Fire Regalis)
flavorTextEN: That's because I'm a genius.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (VC), choose up to one World card from your hand or drop, and put it into your Order Zone.
[AUTO](VC):When this unit attacks, if your World is Abyssal Dark Night, COST  [Counter Blast (1) & discard a card from your hand], and for every two World cards in your Order Zone, call up to one Shadow Army token to (RC), and this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of that battle. (If there are four World cards, [Power]+10000)
flavorTextEN: On this night of darkness, we shall prepare our blades for battle,

effectEN:
[CONT](RC):During the battle this unit attacked, your opponent cannot call normal units to (GC) nor play blitz orders from their hand.
[CONT](RC):If five or less of your opponent's cards are imprisoned in your Prison, this unit cannot attack.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: • All of this card's abilities are currently unknown. However, it's known that, this card is related to "Armed Arms", which can be armed to it.

[CONT](RC):During the battle this unit attacked, your opponent cannot call normal units to (GC) nor play blitz orders from their hand.
[CONT](RC):If five or less of your opponent's cards are imprisoned in your Prison, this unit cannot attack.
flavorTextEN: The lovely ace, known for her overwhelming arrest rate.

effectEN: All of this card's abilities are currently unknown. However, it's known that this card is the boss unit of a new ride line, whose gimmick resolves around Product cards, including "Mobile Fortification of Annihilation, Freischutz Maxim".
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

nameEN: Mobile Fortification of Annihilation, Freischutz Maxim
effectEN: All of this card's abilities are currently unknown. However, it's known that this card is necessary for "Blitz CEO, Welstra".

[AUTO](RC):At the end of the battle your vanguard with "Seraph" in its card name attacked, COST  [Counter Blast (2)], and [Stand] this unit. Your opponent chooses one of their grade 1 or greater cards imprisoned in your Prison, and puts it into their hand.
flavorTextEN: Stop resisting or you'll be made to stop!

effectEN:
[CONT](VC):All of your front row rear-guards with "Hero" in their card names get [Power]+5000. (Active on opponent's turn too)
[AUTO](VC):When this unit attacks, if your Order Zone has a Base card, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], until end of that battle, this unit gets [Power]+15000, and if your Order Zone has three or more Base cards, it gets [Critical]+1.
flavorTextEN: You won't learn anything by merely howling justice.

effectEN:
[AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks, this unit gets [Power]+2000 until end of that battle for each World in your Order Zone.
[AUTO]:When this unit is retired from (RC), if your World is Abyssal Dark Night, you may call a Shadow Army token to (RC).
flavorTextEN: Melding into the darkness, striking at evil.

effectEN:
[AUTO](VC):When this unit attacks a vanguard, choose one of your Products in your Order Zone, and operate it. (Activate its Operate ability)
[AUTO](VC):When one of your Products is operated, this unit gets [Power] +5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: An endless untrodden field. What I seek can be found there.

nameEN: Mobile Fortress of Obliteration, Freischutz Maximum
effectEN:
[CONT]:You cannot play this card.
Operate-[AUTO](Order Zone):When this card is operated, choose one of your opponent's rear-guards, retire it, choose one of your opponent's vanguards, and it gets [Power]-5000 until end of turn. COST  [Counter Blast (1) & Return a rear-guard to hand], and call this card as a [Power]23000/[Critical]1 normal unit to an open (RC). If you called a card, put that unit into the Order Zone at the end of turn.
flavorTextEN: A perfect air fortress that has all of Cray within its shooting range.
